concerns.text: The 'Verified Dataset Sources' section lists a URL for 'Lex Fridman Podcasts (RAM)' (https://huggingface.co/datasets/RamAnanth1/lex-fridman-podcasts/resolve/main/lex-fridman-podcast-dataset.jsonl) but the dataset name 'Ram' appears to be a typo or placeholder for the uploader 'RamAnanth1'. While the URL is present, the citation should explicitly name the dataset as 'lex-fridman-podcasts' by 'RamAnanth1' to ensure clarity and avoid confusion with the 'RAM (jsonl)' label used in the text. Additionally, the 'OOM Test Cases' URL points to a specific parquet file; ensure this file is stable and not a temporary upload, as the plan relies on it for stress-testing.
